features: 【Package Quantity】about 100g gift box shredded tissue paper, which are enough quantity for you to use. Natural shade of cream color, perfect for Valentine's Day, Birthday, Halloween Christmas gift decorations.
【Material】Shredded paper Made from 2-3mm wide lightweight paper, eco-friendly and non-toxic, very light, can be used to protect the glass and fragile items.
【Wide Use】This cream color shredded tissue paper can be used on birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Valentines, New Years or other occasions
【Warm Tips】Each pack of cut paper is packed in a vacuum. Keep the shredded tissue paper away from heat or fire. Not recommended for children under the age of Five. Please use under adult supervision.
